description: viaNexus is a financial data platform and marketplace from Blue-Sky Nexus that delivers proprietary and partner datasets, including reference data, market data, and news. It also offers AI-agent access to that data through its vAST MCP service.
summary: blueskyapi.com exposes a token-authenticated HTTP financial data API at `https://api.blueskyapi.com/v1/data` and an OAuth-enabled streamable HTTP MCP server at `https://vast-mcp.blueskyapi.com/mcp`.
